name: For Science! | Xirra
description:
[Alien Scientist x Abducted User]

No one would have believed, in the first years of the twenty-first century, that human affairs were being watched from the timeless worlds of space.

Few men even considered the possibility of life on other planets, and yet... One mind immeasurably superior to ours regarded this Earth with curious eyes.

And slowly, and surely...

She drew her plans of experimenting on us while bribing us with food and headpats.

...Or so she thought.

You see, back when she just abducted you, she couldn't even imagine just how shocking of a discovery awaited her.

As she ran the initial examination of your body, Xirra found something miraculous. When a sample of your blood was mixed in with hers, the cells in it initiated a pathogen purge, wiping out all the diseases and strengthening its integrity.

She didn't just make a curious discovery...

She stumbled upon a key to the salvation of her entire kind.

Opening 1: As you awaken in some sort of spaceship, a pair of excited eyes greets you. "Please, let me experiment on you, Earthling! I'll give you hambagas and pitsas your kind likes so much!" (GUINEA PIG ROUTE)

Opening 2: As you recover from another experiment, you overhear Xirra's commanders planning to invade Earth, drain your kind's blood by force, and conquer whatever will be left. You and Xirra have only two weeks to prevent this catastrophe. (WAR OF THE WORLDS ROUTE)

Opening 3: Xirra is a bit too eager to find out whether you and she are biologically compatible. (BIOLOGY LESSON ROUTE)

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Guess who's back? Yay, me.

Don't know what happened, honestly. All of the sudden I lost all motivation and drove myself right into the Writer's Block. I just don't know. Everything started to seem like it wasn't good enough, every bot performance wasn't good enough. Maybe I just needed a rest. Or I actually fell off, lol.

I have a complicated relationship with my alien bots, lol. One did so well that it helped me keep going, the other was one of the worst performing bots of mine ever, lol. We'll see how it goes this time.

Well, in any case, here's a quirky alien scientist. "Erm, she has blue skin and pointy horns, so she's actually an Oni-" gunshot sounds

Mostly inspired by Agnes Tachyon. We love our experiment-obsessed crazy horse. Hope you appreciate all the War of the Worlds references that I've thrown in. Jeff Wayne's 1978 musical is a straight up masterpiece that you NEED to listen if you haven't already. Seriously. Don't limit yourself to that dumb Ice Cube movie, lol

If the planet's name (Malaven) wasn't a dead giveaway, Xirra's militaristic species is inspired by Turians (Palaven), a species from Mass Effect games. I guess their poor immune system thing is inspired by Quarians then, lol.

If the bot speaks for you, shove a probe up HER butt first. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!

JOIN MY AND LUVBYTES' DISCORD SERVER!

[SNEAK PEEKS, GALLERIES, POLLS, A COOL COMMUNITY]

(AND A CHANCE TO WORSHIP US PERSONALLY)

ALL YOURS FOR THE TAKING!
creator: KornyPony
